comment: Q1 revenue +112% YoY and +32% QoQ.
Operating expense growth outpaced revenue growth YoY.
GAAP operating loss widened despite revenue scale.
Margin pressure reflects deployment costs before full revenue ramp.
Interest burden rose materially; key thesis risk.
GAAP net loss widened YoY and QoQ.
Loss margin worsened versus Q4 and prior year.
Underlying EBITDA remains strong.
Still high, but below prior year.
Adjusted operating income nearly compressed to breakeven.
Main quality issue in the quarter.
Adjusted net loss widened sharply.
Backlog +284% YoY and +49% QoQ.
Cash declined QoQ; restricted cash not included.
AR declined QoQ and supported operating cash flow.
Asset base continues to scale aggressively.
Balance sheet expansion is capex-led.
Current debt rose QoQ.
Non-current debt rose QoQ.
Debt load is central to equity risk.
Strong OCF, helped by working-capital inflows and deferred revenue.
Cash capex intensity remains very high.
Investment cash burn far exceeds OCF.
Funding stack continues to support growth.
Capacity crossed 1 GW in Q1.
Contracted power rose by more than 400 MW QoQ.
